---
title: "LIBRE presentation for Horizon 2020"
date: 2014-02-14
description: "Slides from my presentation of Open Scholar and the LIBRE project at the Information Days on Horizon 2020 in Brussels."
categories: [Talks & Presentations, Scholarly Communication, Slides]
aliases:
  - /2014/02/14/libre-presentation-for-horizon-2020/
---

Today I made a brief presentation of Open Scholar and the LIBRE project at the Information Days on Horizon 2020 that was held in Brussels from 12–14 of February. I had the chance to receive first hand information about the e-Infrastructures calls, listen to many interesting proposals and discuss about possible collaborations with potential partners.

<a href="assets/LIBRE-Brussels.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides"></i> Slides</a>
